title: UDS Component Examples Manifest
description: Declares the example HTML files for a component, what shows in docs, and what's eligible for the Demo Builder. Lives at uds/components/<id>/examples/manifest.json.

id.description: Stable identifier for this example, used by implReference, Examples tab linking, and Demo Builder selection.

file.description: Path to the HTML fragment, relative to this manifest. e.g. 'default.html'.

label.description: Human-readable heading shown above the example on the docs page.

description.description: Optional caption shown below the heading.

showInDocs.description: Whether this example renders on the component's docs page Examples tab.

demoWeight.description: Demo Builder picks weighted-randomly among entries with demoWeight > 0. 0 excludes from Demo Builder.
